description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CMake (Windows 8.1) that runs on push to main and on pull requests to main, ignoring certain paths. The workflow should run on a Windows 2022 environment with a matrix strategy for different tool versions, build types, and architectures. It should check out the code, install Ninja, set up the MSVC development environment, configure and build with CMake for different presets and configurations, and clean up after each build.
